projects.title: Impostral
projects.description: A social bluffing game where humans hunt and eliminate hidden AIs, while Mistral agents must identify and eliminate the humans before being exposed.
projects.tech: Social Game / Mistral, Voxtral, FastAPI, WebSockets
projects.previewAlt: Impostral social bluffing game home screen

projects.title: World Cup Simulator
projects.description: A live, interactive World Cup companion blending scores, market-implied odds and Monte Carlo simulations for fans following the tournament on site and around the world.
projects.tech: Sports Analytics / React, TypeScript, Vite, Monte Carlo
projects.previewAlt: World Cup Lab interactive tournament bracket

projects.title: LLM Chess Arena
projects.description: Pick two AI models, watch a chess battle between them and use the result to update the leaderboard.
projects.tech: Chess & AI / Generative AI, Python, Flask, GCP

projects.title: English Buddy
projects.description: Practice English conversation and improve your skills with AI feedback and pronunciation insights.
projects.tech: Learning App / Generative AI, Python, Flask, GCP

projects.title: Papilles
projects.description: A visual cookbook made for home chefs. Create, organize, and cook your favorite recipes with an elegant and intuitive interface.
projects.tech: Cooking / Generative AI, Python, Django, Supabase, GCP

projects.title: Goal Tracker
projects.description: A web application to track your goals and progress with a gamified experience.

projects.title: Debate AI
projects.description: Create and observe AI-powered debates between characters you define.
projects.tech: AI Playground / Generative AI, Python, Streamlit

projects.title: Cursor Feedback
projects.description: A lightweight feedback tool designed to reduce the need for frequent Cursor Agent requests.

projects.title: Life Pulse
projects.description: A daily life tracker that helps you monitor your habits, goals, and overall well-being.

projects.title: Des Chiffres Et Des Lettres
projects.description: A family-friendly adaptation of the classic French game "Des chiffres et des lettres" - perfect for brain training and fun with family and friends.

projects.title: Pictify
projects.description: Upload a picture and get a personalized Spotify playlist based on the mood, colors, and emotions captured in your picture.
projects.tech: Music & AI / Deep Learning, Python, Streamlit
